meta.name: Unicorn
meta.author: petpet-builtin
meta.description: A sparkly pink unicorn companion — Easy difficulty. Hatches from a crystal egg and grows into a winged alicorn on a rainbow cloud, then ascends in gold.

species.name: Unicorn
species.description: A magical unicorn that grows wings, a rainbow mane, and finally golden splendour. Thrives on gentle daily conversation; reaches its final form in about a month of regular use.
species.flavor: Born from a glittering crystal egg.
